title: Deal Script Updates
summary: Updated all 5 deal system scripts to use unified n5_core.db database via db_paths.py imports

deal_cli.py: Replaced direct DB_PATH with import from db_paths.py
Adapted show_deal() to fetch contacts via people + deal_roles junction
Added new 'contacts' subcommand to show deal contacts
Updated add_deal() to create person + deal_role when --contact provided
Updated summary() to show deal_roles statistics
Simplified schema usage (removed columns not in new schema like owner, thesis, next_action)
deal_query.py: Changed search() to query people table instead of deal_contacts
Changed list_contacts() to use deal_roles junction table
Updated summary() to show people linked via deal_roles
deal_signal_router.py: Removed db_path parameter, now uses db_paths.py
Updated load_people_with_roles() to query people + deal_roles
Adapted _apply_update() for new schema (notes instead of next_action column)
Updated deal_activities insert to use timestamp instead of created_at
deal_proactive_sensor.py: Removed db_path parameter, now uses db_paths.py
Updated is_entity_known() to check people table
Updated _create_entity() to create people entries instead of deal_contacts
Brokers/leadership now create person records (can be linked to deals via deal_roles later)
broker_detector.py: Completely rewrote persist_broker() to create people entries with broker notes

tests_passed: deal_cli.py summary - Shows 99 deals, correct pipeline breakdown
deal_query.py summary - Shows 259 people in CRM, 0 linked to deals (deal_roles empty)
deal_query.py search 'darwinbox' - Finds deal AND matching person
deal_signal_router.py --dry-run - Correctly matches deal and extracts signal
deal_proactive_sensor.py --dry-run - Detects entities and formats SMS
broker_detector.py - Detects broker signals from transcript
notes_for_orchestrator: deal_roles table is currently empty (0 entries) - migration W1.x should populate this
New schema has fewer columns than old deals.db - fields like owner, thesis, next_action, last_touched are not present
Added notes-based workaround in signal_router for next_action since column doesn't exist
All scripts now consistently use get_db_connection() from db_paths.py
Added 'contacts' subcommand to deal_cli.py for viewing deal contacts
